reason: Verify M3 against backend project rules and pre-development checklist.
Check deterministic eval coverage, regression gate behavior, and scope control.
Check JSONL loader, CLI exit codes, and invalid data failures are clear and stable.
Verify CLI-to-runner-to-search data flow and report output across layers.
Check implementation reuses existing core search/build contracts without duplicating logic.
Verify implementation satisfies M3 acceptance criteria and out-of-scope boundaries.
Verify implemented contracts match eval dataset, metrics, report, and CLI design.
